query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `changeRequests` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `crId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `requestedBy` varchar(200),
  `requestedById` int,
  `assignedTo` varchar(200),
  `assignedToId` int,
  `priority` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Medium',
  `status` enum('Draft','Submitted','Under Review','Approved','Rejected','Implemented','Closed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Draft',
  `impactAssessment` text,
  `requirementId` varchar(50),
  `taskId` varchar(50),
  `issueId` varchar(50),
  `submittedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `reviewedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `approvedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `implementedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `reviewedBy` varchar(200),
  `approvedBy` varchar(200),
  `rejectionReason` text,
  `estimatedEffort` varchar(100),
  `actualEffort` varchar(100),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `changeRequests_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `meetings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `meetingId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `meetingDate` date NOT NULL,
  `startTime` varchar(10),
  `endTime` varchar(10),
  `location` varchar(255),
  `organizer` varchar(200),
  `organizerId` int,
  `attendees` json,
  `agenda` text,
  `minutes` text,
  `status` enum('Scheduled','In Progress','Completed','Cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Scheduled',
  `nextMeetingDate` date,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `meetings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `decisions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `decisionId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `meetingId` int,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `decisionDate` date NOT NULL,
  `decidedBy` varchar(200),
  `decidedById` int,
  `status` enum('Open','Implemented','Deferred','Cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Open',
  `impact` varchar(100),
  `requirementId` varchar(50),
  `taskId` varchar(50),
  `issueId` varchar(50),
  `actionItems` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `decisions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `testCases` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `testId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `requirementId` varchar(50),
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `preconditions` text,
  `testSteps` json,
  `expectedResult` text,
  `actualResult` text,
  `tester` varchar(200),
  `testerId` int,
  `priority` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Medium',
  `status` enum('Not Executed','In Progress','Passed','Failed','Blocked','Skipped') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Not Executed',
  `testType` varchar(100),
  `executionDate` date,
  `defectId` varchar(50),
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `testCases_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `taskDependencies` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `predecessorTaskId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `successorTaskId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `dependencyType` enum('Finish-to-Start','Start-to-Start','Finish-to-Finish','Start-to-Finish') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Finish-to-Start',
  `lagDays` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `taskDependencies_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `testCases` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `testId` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `requirementId` varchar(50),

  `description` text,

  `testSteps` json,

  `tester` varchar(200),

  `priority` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Medium',
  `status` enum('Not Executed','In Progress','Passed','Failed','Blocked','Skipped') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Not Executed',
  `testType` varchar(100),
  `executionDate` date,
  `defectId` varchar(50),

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `taskDependencies` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
